方效林
职称：副高
所在院系：计算机工程系
研究方向：感知数据处理，无人机自动控制，深度学习
电话：
邮箱：
职务：
个人简介

方效林，男，博士，副教授，2014年毕业于哈尔滨工业大学计算机软件与理论专业，师从高宏和李建中教授，获博士学位。同年进入东南大学计算机科学与工程学院任教。其研究领域包括传感器网络数据分析处理技术及其应用、无人机自动控制等。


研究方向
教育经历
工作经历
科研项目

正主持国家自然科学基金面上项目1项、国际(地区)合作与交流项目课题1项，已主持完成国家自然科学基金面上项目1项、青年项目1项，参与国家重点研发计划、国家自然科学基金重点项目、面上项目多项。

论文著作

发表论文

Zihan Zhou, Changrui Dai, Aibo Song, Xiaolin Fang. Enhancing Self-Supervised Fine-Grained Video Object Tracking with Dynamic Memory Prediction. ICMR 2025: 1886-1893 

Juwei Guan, Weiqi Qian, Tongxin Zhu, Xiaolin Fang. Promoting camouflaged object detection through novel edge-target interaction and frequency-spatial fusion. Neurocomputing 617: 129064 (2025) 

Yuntao Ma, Xiaolin Fang, Jin Qi, Yanfei Sun. Research on resource allocation methods for traditional Chinese medicine services based on deep reinforcement learning. Neural Comput. Appl. 37(3): 1601-1616 (2025) 

Juwei Guan, Xiaolin Fang, Tongxin Zhu, Zhipeng Cai, Zhen Ling, Ming Yang, Junzhou Luo. IdeNet: Making Neural Network Identify Camouflaged Objects Like Creatures. IEEE Transactions on Image Processing 33: 4824-4839 (2024) 

Jingyi Qiu, Aibo Song, Jiahui Jin, Jiaoyan Chen, Xinyu Zhang, Xiaolin Fang, Tianbo Zhang. Matching Tabular Data to Knowledge Graph with Effective Core Column Set Discovery. ACM Transactions on Web 18(4): 51:1-51:27 (2024)

Tongxin Zhu, Ouming Zou, Xiaolin Fang, Junzhou Luo, Yingshu Li, Zhipeng Cai. Group-Centric Scheduling for Industrial Edge Computing Networks with Incomplete Information. ICDCS 2024: 555-564

Haodi Wang, Kai Dong, Zhilei Zhu, Haotong Qin, Aishan Liu, Xiaolin Fang, Jiakai Wang, Xianglong Liu. Transferable Multimodal Attack on Vision-Language Pre-training Models. S&P 2024: 1722-1740 

Tongxin Zhu, Zhipeng Cai, Xiaolin Fang, Junzhou Luo, Ming Yang. Correlation Aware Scheduling for Edge-Enabled Industrial Internet of Things. IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics 18(11): 7967-7976 (2022)

Ran Bi, Ting Peng, Jiankang Ren, Xiaolin Fang, Guozhen Tan. Joint Service Placement and Computation Scheduling in Edge Clouds. ICWS 2022: 47-56

Xiaolin Fang, Weiwei Wu, Ran Bi, Wei Bian, Zenghui Zhang. A system to monitor one's nearsightedness implicitly. CCF Transactions on Pervasive Computing Interactaction 3(3): 223-234 (2021)

Weiwei Wu, Wanyuan Wang, Xiaolin Fang, Junzhou Luo, Athanasios V. Vasilakos. Electricity Price-aware Consolidation Algorithms for Time-sensitive VM Services in Cloud Systems. IEEE Transactions on Services Computing 14(6): 1726-1738 (2021)

Fang Xiaolin, Luo Junzhou, Gao Hong, Wu Weiwei, Cheng Siyao, Cai Zhipeng. Detecting deterioration of nearsightness. ACM/IEEE IPSN 2015.

Cheng Siyao, Cai Zhipeng, Li Jianzhong, Fang Xiaolin. Drawing Dominant Dataset from Big Sensory Data in Wireless Sensor Networks. IEEE INFOCOM 2015.

Fang Xiaolin, Gao Hong, Li Jianzhong, Li Yingshu. Approximate Multiple Count in Wireless Sensor Networks. IEEE INFOCOM 2014.

Fang Xiaolin,  Gao Hong, Li Jianzhong, Li Yingshu. Application-Aware Data Collection  in Wireless Sensor Networks. IEEE INFOCOM 2013. Turin, Italy, April  14-19, 2013.

Liu Yu, Li Jianzhong, Gao Hong, Fang Xiaolin. Enabling epsilon-Approximate Querying in Sensor Networks. VLDB 2(1): 169-180, Lyon, France, August 24-28, 2009.

Xiaolin Fang, Zhipeng Cai, Wenyi Tang, Guangchun Luo, Junzhou Luo, Ran Bi, Hong Gao. Job Scheduling to Minimize  Total Completion Time on Multiple Edge Servers. Transactions on Network  Science and Engineering. 7(4):2245-2255 (2020)

Xiaolin Fang,   Junzohu Luo, Guangchun Luo, Weiwei Wu, Zhipeng Cai, Yi Pan. Big Data   Transmission in Industrial IoT Systems with Small Capacitor Supplying   Energy. IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics 15(4):2360-2371 (2019)

Gao Hong, Fang Xiaolin,  Li Jianzhong, Li Yingshu. Data Collection in Multi-Application Sharing  Wireless Sensor Networks. IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed  Systems, (TPDS 2015).

Weiwei Wu, Wanyuan Wang, Minming Li, Jianping Wang, Xiaolin Fang,  Yichuan Jiang, Junzhou Luo. Incentive Mechanism Design to Meet Task  Criteria in Crowdsourcing: How to Determine Your Budget. IEEE Journal on  Selected Areas in Communications 35(2): 502-516 (2017)

Quan Chen, Hong Gao, Siyao Cheng, Xiaolin Fang,  Zhipeng Cai, Jianzhong Li. Centralized and Distributed Delay-Bounded  Scheduling Algorithms for Multicast in Duty-Cycled Wireless Sensor  Networks. IEEE/ACM Transactions on Networking. 25(6): 3573-3586 (2017)

Jingyi Qiu, Aibo Song, Jiahui Jin, Tianbo Zhang, Jingyi Ding, Xiaolin Fang, Jianguo Qian. Dependency-Aware Core Column Discovery for Table Understanding. ISWC 2023: 159-178

Zihan Zhou, Changrui Dai, Aibo Song, Xiaolin Fang. Leveraging Motion Information for Better Self-Supervised Video Correspondence Learning. CoRR abs/2503.12026 (2025) 

Juwei Guan, Xiaolin Fang, Donghyun Kim, Haotian Gong, Tongxin Zhu, Zhen Ling, Ming Yang. Knowledge Rectification for Camouflaged Object Detection: Unlocking Insights from Low-Quality Data. CoRR abs/2503.22180 (2025) 

Zihan Zhou, Changrui Dai, Aibo Song, Xiaolin Fang. Enhancing Self-Supervised Fine-Grained Video Object Tracking with Dynamic Memory Prediction. CoRR abs/2504.21692 (2025) 

Jianlin Sun, Xiaolin Fang, Juwei Guan, Dongdong Gui, Teqi Wang, Tongxin Zhu. DRRNet: Macro-Micro Feature Fusion and Dual Reverse Refinement for Camouflaged Object Detection. CoRR abs/2505.09168 (2025) 

Yingying Xue, Aibo Song, Jiahui Jin, Hui Peng, Jingyi Qiu, Xiaolin Fang, Xiaorui Zhai. Relation-oriented few-shot knowledge graph prototype networks. Neurocomputing 575: 127242 (2024) 

Juwei Guan, Xiaolin Fang, Tongxin Zhu, Weiqi Qian. SDRNet: Camouflaged object detection with independent reconstruction of structure and detail. Knowl. Based Syst. 299: 112051 (2024) 

Ran Bi, Weiye Si, Jiankang Ren, Xiaolin Fang, Yiwei Sun, Bingguo Chen. Dynamic Computation Scheduling for Hybrid Energy Mobile Edge Computing Networks. APWeb/WAIM (4) 2024: 359-376 

Yingying Xue, Aibo Song, Xiaolin Fang, Jiahui Jin, Xiangguo Sun, Yingxue Zhang. Intra- and inter-semantic with multi-scale evolving patterns for dynamic graph learning. Knowl. Based Syst. 260: 110167 (2023) 

Junhua Zhang, Junzhou Luo, Haozhe Zhang, Qingfeng Yuan, Xiaolin Fang. Embedded Platform Based Intelligent Lecture Recording System. CSCWD 2023: 375-380 

Yuntao Ma, Lihe Wang, Junzhou Luo, Xiaolin Fang. A Trusted and Intelligent Service System for the Decoction of Traditional Chinese Medicine. CSCWD 2023: 666-672

Wenjia Wu, Yujing Liu, Jiazhi Yao, Xiaolin Fang, Feng Shan, Ming Yang, Zhen Ling, Junzhou Luo. Learning-aided client association control for high-density WLANs. Comput. Networks 212: 109043 (2022) 

Xiaolin Fang, Hu Fan, Ming Yang, Tongxin Zhu, Ran Bi, Zenghui Zhang, Zhiyuan Gao. Small object detection in remote sensing images based on super-resolution. Pattern Recognit. Lett. 153: 107-112 (2022) 

Xiaolin Fang,  Junzhou Luo, Hong Gao, Weiwei Wu, Yingshu Li. Scheduling multi-task  jobs with extra utility in data centers. EURASIP J. Wireless Comm. and  Networking 2017: 200 (2017)

Wenjia Wu, Junzhou Luo, Ming Yang, Xiaolin Fang. Energy-efficient activation of nodes and radios in multi-radio WLAN mesh networks. IJSNet 23(3): 187-200 (2017)

Fang Xiaolin,  Gao Hong, Li Jianzhong. Reliability-Aware Power Adjustment in Air-Soil  Wireless Sensor Networks. Ad Hoc & Sensor Wireless Networks, 2013,  18(3-4): 203-223.

Fang Xiaolin,  Gao Hong, Li Jianzhong. MovPro:Data Dissemination for Reprogramming in  Wireless Sensor Network with Mobile Sink. Chinese Journal of  Electronics, 2013, Volume 41(5): 1007-1011. (In Chinese)

Fang Xiaolin,  Gao Hong, Xiong Shuguang. RPR: high-reliable low-cost geographical  routing protocol in wireless sensor networks. Journal on Communications,  2012, 33(5): 29-37. (In Chinese)


专利
获奖情况

兴趣小组

AutoUAV: 发无人机自动驾驶技术，实现自动避障、目标跟踪、路径规划等功能，为灾害救援、 城市应急响应、自主巡检提供技术支撑。看以下我们学生做的几个工作，都非常有意思。

基于单目摄像头的无人机小树林中自主避障：








单目摄像头深度估计：  






Airsim仿真环境下基于强化学习的无人机自主避障：









加入人类经验的强化学习方法：






基于类脑记忆的异常检测：






伪装目标检测：







无监督的全像素目标跟踪：

 





高空图像目标检测：






授课情况

往期录制视频下载链接    提取码：7nw9

作业题目练习链接 http://code8.top

《算法设计与分析_01_引言.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_02_数学基础.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_03_分治.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_04_动态规划.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_05_贪心.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_06_摊还分析.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_07_随机.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_08_NP完全.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_09_近似.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_10_网络流.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_11_在线.pptx》

《算法设计与分析_12_搜索.pptx》

参考书：Michael R. Garey and David S. Johnson. 《Computers And Intractability: A Guide To The Theory Of Np-Completeness》

参考书：Vijay V. Vazirani.《Approximation Algorithms》

参考书：Rajeev Motwani and Prabhakar Raghavan. 《Randomized Algorithms》
